code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if is_ws
        in_token = false
      else
        if not in_token
          count = count + 1
          in_token = true
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let state = count % 3
  match state
  when 0
    println("Red")
  when 1
    println("Green")
  when _
    println("Yellow")
  end
end
